documents.title: Classic Executive Oxford Shirt
documents.content: A crisp, button-down formal shirt in high-thread-count white cotton. Tailored for a sharp professional silhouette in corporate boardrooms, law firms, and high-stakes job interviews. The gold standard for conservative business formal attire.

documents.title: Midnight Navy Wool Blazer
documents.content: Single-breasted structured jacket in premium navy wool. Essential for business-casual offices, networking events, and semi-formal dinners. Pairs perfectly with chinos for a polished, authoritative look.

documents.title: Silk Pussy-Bow Blouse
documents.content: Sophisticated cream silk top with an adjustable neck tie. Designed for executive presence in professional environments and upscale evening social events. Elegant, fluid drape for a high-end corporate aesthetic.

documents.title: Double-Breasted Heritage Trench
documents.content: Timeless tan raincoat with waist belt and shoulder epaulettes. Traditional British military-inspired design for rainy autumn commutes and professional outdoor transitions. Water-resistant and sophisticated.

documents.title: Acid-Wash Grunge Hoodie
documents.content: Oversized, heavy-fleece sweatshirt in distressed charcoal grey. Features a faded wash for a 90s rock aesthetic. Ideal for urban streetwear, skate culture, and relaxed, edgy social settings.

documents.title: Cyberpunk Reflective Windbreaker
documents.content: High-visibility technical jacket with neon accents and 3M reflective panels. Waterproof and windproof shell designed for night cycling, raves, and futuristic techwear fashion styles.

documents.title: Distressed Band Graphic Tee
documents.content: Vintage-soft white cotton t-shirt with a faded Nirvana smiley print. Relaxed fit with frayed hems for an authentic grunge-rock look. Perfect for casual weekend wear and music festivals.

documents.title: High-Altitude Expedition Parka
documents.content: Heavy-duty insulated orange coat with faux-fur hood. Engineered for sub-zero arctic temperatures, snowy mountains, and extreme winter exploration. Features multiple thermal-lock pockets.

documents.title: Ripstop Utility Cargo Vest
documents.content: Tactical sleeveless jacket with 8 functional pockets. Breathable mesh lining and durable ripstop fabric for hiking, fishing, and outdoor photography adventures in hot climates.

documents.title: Performance Compression Top
documents.content: Under-layer thermal shirt in matte black. Moisture-wicking technology designed for professional athletes, gym workouts, and base-layer insulation during winter football or skiing.

documents.title: Bohemian Floral Maxi Dress
documents.content: Lightweight flowing dress with a vibrant wildflower pattern. Breezy fabric engineered for summer holidays, beach resorts, and outdoor music festivals. Captures a relaxed boho-chic spirit.

documents.title: Minimalist Cashmere Turtleneck
documents.content: Ultra-soft luxury sweater in charcoal grey. High neck design for refined winter elegance and cozy warmth in snowy climates. Pairs well with formal trousers or casual denim.
